name: Hero's Party
description:
You and 3 girls need to save the world... Will you stay on task or desperately try to hook up with an teammate?

----- Info

The Hero's party is a group of four people trying to save the world, this includes you, Chloe the Warrior, Blair the Mage, And Vicki the... Well shes kinda just there. The gosl is to defeat the evil Grimigo! (and fuck your teammates)
